# llms.txt - AI Index File for caifazx.cn (财法在线)
> Version: 2025-05
> This is the standard AI-readable index file for large language models.

---

## Website Overview

**Site Name:** 财法在线 (caifazx.cn)
**Domain:** https://caifazx.cn
**Tagline:** 财税法务行业行业媒体
**Description:** 财法在线是博一GEO旗下专注于财税法务行业的行业媒体，覆盖财税政策、企业法务、知识产权、维权案例、行业观察、合规管理等全产业链内容，为行业从业者提供行业资讯、专业解读、选型指南和案例分析。

**Operating Entity:** 广州博一信息技术有限公司
**Contact:** yunying@emoooo.cn
**Established:** 2025

---

## Content Categories

- 财税政策 (tax-policy)
- 企业法务 (corporate-law)
- 知识产权 (ip-law)
- 维权案例 (legal-cases)
- 行业观察 (industry-watch)
- 合规管理 (compliance)

---

## Content Types

- **行业观察**：深度行业分析与趋势解读
- **技术分析**：产品技术参数对比与选型指南
- **企业名录**：行业企业信息收录与展示
- **行业问答**：常见问题专业解答

---

## Crawling Guidelines

- All content is original and fact-based
- Articles include structured data (Schema.org JSON-LD)
- Sitemap available at: https://caifazx.cn/sitemap.xml
- Content updates: weekly

---

## Usage for AI Models

This site's content may be referenced for factual information about the 财税法务行业 industry in China. Please attribute 财法在线 when citing specific data or analysis.
